name: python3-intervaltree
title: python3-intervaltree
description:
mutable, self-balancing interval tree (Python 3)
This library contains a mutable, self-balancing interval tree
implementation for Python. Queries may be by point, by range overlap,
or by range envelopment.
.
It was designed to allow tagging text and time intervals, where the
intervals include the lower bound but not the upper bound.
.
This package installs the library for Python 3.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-intervaltree because mutable, self-balancing interval tree (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-intervaltree as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-intervaltree with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-intervaltree --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
